## Feedback space for Sergio

Use this section for notes from mobile review:

```text
What felt confusing:

What felt too small or hard to tap:

What needs to be more field-proof / mistake-resistant:

What should change before merge:

Approved to merge? yes/no:
```

## User friendliness checklist

- [ ] Mobile-first route tested or reviewed.
- [ ] Desktop route tested or reviewed when relevant.
- [ ] Primary action is obvious.
- [ ] Buttons are easy to tap on iPhone.
- [ ] Copy is plain-language and professional.
- [ ] Equipment-document mapping impact considered.
- [ ] No paid AI calls added unless explicitly approved.
- [ ] No AWS resources deployed unless explicitly approved.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit`
- [ ] `npx tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm run build`
